Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The SetBufferLayout method defines the layout of the buffer. Must be set before calling AllocateMemory.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void SetBufferLayout(ImageFormat imageFormat, DataFormat dataFormat, size_t entryCount);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The image channel layout to allocate for each texel entry.
The hardware data encoding to allocate for each texel entry.
The number of entries to allocate in the array.
